markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review content performance and align on the new glossary strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/hE8Ms-Tw9m5dGwKb48Cbajoa8JfVyRmD?tab=summary&timestamp=460.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New content bets are outperforming top-of-funnel (ToFu) articles**, driving 34x more product page conversions and 10x more engagement, validating the shift to middle-of-funnel (MoFu) strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/hE8Ms-Tw9m5dGwKb48Cbajoa8JfVyRmD?tab=summary&timestamp=511.0)
  - [**The new FAQ glossary will launch without schema markup** to prioritize speed; the impact on SEO is expected to be minimal based on past tests.](https://fathom.video/share/hE8Ms-Tw9m5dGwKb48Cbajoa8JfVyRmD?tab=summary&timestamp=747.0)
  - [**The glossary will be batched for launch** (2 glossary pages ≈ 1 article) to build critical mass quickly and avoid having isolated, ineffective pages.](https://fathom.video/share/hE8Ms-Tw9m5dGwKb48Cbajoa8JfVyRmD?tab=summary&timestamp=984.0)
  - [**A Q1 strategy session is planned** to scope new projects, including a business credit card content overhaul and a potential programmatic travel page initiative.](https://fathom.video/share/hE8Ms-Tw9m5dGwKb48Cbajoa8JfVyRmD?tab=summary&timestamp=1367.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance & Strategy Validation

  - [**New MoFu Content Outperforms ToFu:** Analysis of the "expense/financial management" and "industry-specific pain points" content bets confirms the strategy is working.](https://fathom.video/share/hE8Ms-Tw9m5dGwKb48Cbajoa8JfVyRmD?tab=summary&timestamp=460.0)
      - [**Conversions:** 34x higher rate of product page visits vs. other business travel guides.](https://fathom.video/share/hE8Ms-Tw9m5dGwKb48Cbajoa8JfVyRmD?tab=summary&timestamp=511.0)
      - [**Engagement:** 10x higher rate of product page visits; 74% engagement vs. 57% for other content.](https://fathom.video/share/hE8Ms-Tw9m5dGwKb48Cbajoa8JfVyRmD?tab=summary&timestamp=587.0)
  - [**LLM Referrals Opportunity:** LLM traffic dipped in late Nov (likely holiday-related), but citations and position remain strong.](https://fathom.video/share/hE8Ms-Tw9m5dGwKb48Cbajoa8JfVyRmD?tab=summary&timestamp=674.0)
      - [**Key Insight:** Scrutiny data shows 78% of Hotel Engine mentions go to third-party sources, not linking back to the site.](https://fathom.video/share/hE8Ms-Tw9m5dGwKb48Cbajoa8JfVyRmD?tab=summary&timestamp=691.0)
      - [**Opportunity:** The FAQ glossary can capture this value by providing structured Q\&A content that LLMs can easily cite.](https://fathom.video/share/hE8Ms-Tw9m5dGwKb48Cbajoa8JfVyRmD?tab=summary&timestamp=691.0)

### FAQ Glossary Strategy & Execution

  - [**Launch Plan:**](https://fathom.video/share/hE8Ms-Tw9m5dGwKb48Cbajoa8JfVyRmD?tab=summary&timestamp=747.0)
      - [**Schema Markup:** Launch without it.](https://fathom.video/share/hE8Ms-Tw9m5dGwKb48Cbajoa8JfVyRmD?tab=summary&timestamp=747.0)
          - [**Rationale:** Prioritize speed. Past tests were inconclusive, and on-page structure is considered more critical for SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/hE8Ms-Tw9m5dGwKb48Cbajoa8JfVyRmD?tab=summary&timestamp=747.0)
      - [**Content Structure:** Use a non-collapsible, glossary-like format with Q\&A pairs.](https://fathom.video/share/hE8Ms-Tw9m5dGwKb48Cbajoa8JfVyRmD?tab=summary&timestamp=904.0)
          - [**Rationale:** This structure is designed for findability by LLMs and avoids JavaScript dependencies that can hinder crawling.](https://fathom.video/share/hE8Ms-Tw9m5dGwKb48Cbajoa8JfVyRmD?tab=summary&timestamp=904.0)
      - [**Batching:** Publish in batches (2 glossary pages ≈ 1 article) to build critical mass quickly.](https://fathom.video/share/hE8Ms-Tw9m5dGwKb48Cbajoa8JfVyRmD?tab=summary&timestamp=984.0)
  - [**Content Creation:**](https://fathom.video/share/hE8Ms-Tw9m5dGwKb48Cbajoa8JfVyRmD?tab=summary&timestamp=1063.0)
      - [**First Draft:** A \~500-word glossary page is in the review queue to align on format and tone.](https://fathom.video/share/hE8Ms-Tw9m5dGwKb48Cbajoa8JfVyRmD?tab=summary&timestamp=1063.0)
      - [**Prioritization:** Use sales call transcripts to identify high-frequency questions and validate topics sourced from Reddit.](https://fathom.video/share/hE8Ms-Tw9m5dGwKb48Cbajoa8JfVyRmD?tab=summary&timestamp=1148.0)

### Q1 Strategic Planning

  - [**Roadmap:** The current content bets have a 4+ month runway. A Q1 strategy session will reassess priorities and scope new projects.](https://fathom.video/share/hE8Ms-Tw9m5dGwKb48Cbajoa8JfVyRmD?tab=summary&timestamp=1367.0)
  - [**Potential Q1 Projects:**](https://fathom.video/share/hE8Ms-Tw9m5dGwKb48Cbajoa8JfVyRmD?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
      - [**Business Credit Card Content:** Overhaul existing content and create new pieces for the Hotel Engine card.](https://fathom.video/share/hE8Ms-Tw9m5dGwKb48Cbajoa8JfVyRmD?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
      - [**Programmatic Travel Pages:** Revisit a past initiative that failed.](https://fathom.video/share/hE8Ms-Tw9m5dGwKb48Cbajoa8JfVyRmD?tab=summary&timestamp=1669.0)
          - [**Challenge:** The market is highly competitive.](https://fathom.video/share/hE8Ms-Tw9m5dGwKb48Cbajoa8JfVyRmD?tab=summary&timestamp=1708.0)
          - [**Opportunity:** Build a unique workflow to succeed where past attempts failed.](https://fathom.video/share/hE8Ms-Tw9m5dGwKb48Cbajoa8JfVyRmD?tab=summary&timestamp=1692.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Joel:**](https://fathom.video/share/hE8Ms-Tw9m5dGwKb48Cbajoa8JfVyRmD?tab=summary&timestamp=1063.0)
      - [Review the first glossary page draft to align on format and tone.](https://fathom.video/share/hE8Ms-Tw9m5dGwKb48Cbajoa8JfVyRmD?tab=summary&timestamp=1063.0)
      - [Implement content tracking for the new bets.](https://fathom.video/share/hE8Ms-Tw9m5dGwKb48Cbajoa8JfVyRmD?tab=summary&timestamp=619.0)
  - [**Carrie:**](https://fathom.video/share/hE8Ms-Tw9m5dGwKb48Cbajoa8JfVyRmD?tab=summary&timestamp=1796.0)
      - [Share the content production and topic queue interface with Luke.](https://fathom.video/share/hE8Ms-Tw9m5dGwKb48Cbajoa8JfVyRmD?tab=summary&timestamp=1796.0)
      - [Begin batching glossary content after receiving feedback on the first draft.](https://fathom.video/share/hE8Ms-Tw9m5dGwKb48Cbajoa8JfVyRmD?tab=summary&timestamp=1295.0)
  - [**All:**](https://fathom.video/share/hE8Ms-Tw9m5dGwKb48Cbajoa8JfVyRmD?tab=summary&timestamp=1367.0)
      - [Schedule a Q1 strategy session to scope new projects.](https://fathom.video/share/hE8Ms-Tw9m5dGwKb48Cbajoa8JfVyRmD?tab=summary&timestamp=1367.0)
